name: Skill Advisor - Recommend Skills
description: Validates that the Skill Advisor uses semantic search and graph tools to recommend complementary skills for a given topic.

parts.text: Recommend skills for Kubernetes deployment and management.

Based on my analysis of the skills graph, here are recommended skills for Kubernetes deployment and management:
